dialogs.script:
say: You already have a starter, {player}!
say: Take good care of it!

showimage: pokemon/charmander
say: Charmander!
say: The Lizard Pokemon. A Fire type.
say: Its flame burns bright in battle!
choice: Do you want to choose Charmander?
hideimage
givepokemon: charmander 5
setflag: pokemon_chosen
setflag: starter_is_charmander
clearflag: starter_is_bulbasaur
clearflag: starter_is_squirtle
say: Charmander was added to your party!
say: Take good care of it, {player}!
hidenpc
